Off Calendar Jul-08-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. STEVE R. SHERMAN, Esq. of Sherman Law Offices (Tel: 925-463-3301) for plaintiff;
Atty. ANTHONY ALDEN, Esq. of Quinn Emanuel Urquhart & Sullivan LLP (Tel: 213-443-3000) for defendants Linda Liu and Chiungyao Yu (aka Nick Yu).

HEARING RE: DEFENDANTS LINDA LIU AND CHIUNGYAO YU'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT.

Matter argued.

The Court grants the parties leave for each side to submit a supplemental brief no longer than five pages in length. Parties are to submit this by email no later than the close of business of July 7, 2021.

The Court will take this matter under submission on July 7, 2021.
